title: Webinar Series Part-1 Opportunities and Challenges in 6G
subtitle: The objective of this event was to inculcate the importance and the growth of 6G wireless technology in today’s world.
description: Title of the event: Opportunities & challenges in 6G wireless technologyObjective: The objective of this event was to inculcate the importance and the growth of 6G wireless technology in today’s world. This would equip students and academicians to research and create new innovations in the wireless communication space.The webinar helped us summarize points regarding the role of different mobile generations in India.
